title: clinopodium dalmaticum subsp. dalmaticum
intro: Clinopodium dalmaticum subsp. dalmaticum, a subspecies of the Clinopodium dalmaticum plant, is a perennial herb belonging to the mint family (Lamiaceae). Traditionally, this plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits associated with Clinopodium dalmaticum subsp. dalmaticum include relief from digestive issues, improved respiratory health, and a reduced risk of infections. Herbal preparations of this plant, such as teas and infusions, can be made by steeping the leaves in hot water, and it is often used in traditional medicine to support overall well-being.
